title: paeonia officinalis var. tartarica
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. tartarica, commonly known as the Tibetan peony, is a perennial plant species in the Paeoniaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. tartarica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce anxiety and stress levels. Paeonia officinalis var. tartarica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, and is often used in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine.
